room.caption: [NightmareD2] Our electrical bills were getting too high, so we replaced most of the currents with spikes. We apologize for the inconvenience.

instance.creationCode: image_xscale=32 image_yscale=64 bShifting=1 shiftMax=72 xSpd=2 ySpd=0
